raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased tickets through XXXX XXXX for a trip from XXXX to XXXX in XX/XX/year>. 

XXXX XXXX without my authorization changed my seats and billed my card. 

I disputed the transaction and Amex did not resolve the dispute in my favor. Reopened the dispute multiple times. 

Amex is required to protect its customers from predatory practices such as this one.
